pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.18 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime incompatibilities and missing features required for the target environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target compatibility remains at Java 11 while using Java 21 features or libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate validation API dependency from javax.validation to jakarta.validation-api to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), leading to ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if the old artifact is used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude legacy JUnit 4 dependency from a transitive dependency to avoid conflicts with JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes may conflict with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) test runners in Spring Boot 3.x, causing test execution failures or ambiguous classpath issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace webjars-locator with webjars-locator-core to use the modern, maintained artifact for WebJars resolution.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old webjars-locator artifact is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Boot versions, leading to missing class errors at runtime.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environments where Jakarta EE namespaces are mandatory.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet import with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+; compilation fails with 'package javax.servlet does not exist'.
